title: Complementary Music
description: This pack adds music that fits another block-themed game (Total Miner Forge).
body:
**Complementary Music**

This pack adds /replaces music that fits another block-themed game ([Total Miner Forge](https://store.steampowered.com/app/347600/Total_Miner/)). 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DJr8TXeeEn0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[Full Playlist Here](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlEhI7YH7xIy-hAQsZsfyOfFJ52GgykF1)
